% Refutation found. Thanks to Tanya!
% SZS status Theorem for humans_horses_negative

1. ! [X0] : (horse(X0) => has_hooves(X0)) [input(axiom)]
2. ! [X0] : (human(X0) => ~has_hooves(X0)) [input(axiom)]
3. ! [X0] : (~human(X0) | ~horse(X0)) [input(conjecture)]
4. ~! [X0] : (~human(X0) | ~horse(X0)) [negated conjecture 3]
5. ! [X0] : (has_hooves(X0) | ~horse(X0)) [ennf transformation 1]
6. ! [X0] : (~has_hooves(X0) | ~human(X0)) [ennf transformation 2]
7. ? [X0] : (human(X0) & horse(X0)) [ennf transformation 4]
8. ? [X0] : (human(X0) & horse(X0)) => (human(sK0) & horse(sK0)) [skolem symbol introduction]
9. human(sK0) & horse(sK0) [skolemisation 7,8]
10. ~horse(X0) | has_hooves(X0) [cnf transformation 5]
11. ~human(X0) | ~has_hooves(X0) [cnf transformation 6]
12. horse(sK0) [cnf transformation 9]
13. human(sK0) [cnf transformation 9]
14. has_hooves(sK0) [resolution 10,12]
15. ~has_hooves(sK0) [resolution 11,13]
16. $false [forward subsumption resolution 15,14]
% SZS output end Proof for humans_horses_negative
% Termination reason: Refutation
